title: AI/LLM Core Security | Retrieval Augmentation Generation (RAG) Implementation

configuration.prompt: A scientific research company is implementing Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) to enhance their pre-trained Large Language Model with specific company documentation. What is the primary benefit of implementing RAG in this scenario?

choices.choice: RAG benefits by enhancing pre-trained models with specific information while maintaining base capabilities.
RAG benefits by replacing pre-trained models by creating entirely new model architectures.
RAG benefits by translating content between different programming languages and frameworks automatically.
RAG benefits by providing encryption and security features for protecting sensitive model information.
